# Astro

> Deterministic, multi-tradition astrology ephemeris engine for AI agents.

## What it does

Decouples calculation from interpretation. A pure-Python engine computes
real sky positions; the host LLM interprets the structured output using
classical rulesets. The model never has to hallucinate a planetary position.

## Quick start

```bash
npx skills add aryaminus/astro -g       # 50+ agent hosts
/plugin marketplace add aryaminus/astro  # Claude Code
pip install -r requirements.txt && uvicorn skills.astrology.scripts.api:app  # REST API
```

## Key files

- `skills/astrology/scripts/astro_engine.py` — zero-dep math engine. Do NOT add external deps.
- `skills/astrology/scripts/mcp_server.py` — MCP wrapper (18 tools, stdio + SSE)
- `skills/astrology/scripts/api.py` — FastAPI (27 endpoints, free by default)
- `skills/astrology/SKILL.md` — runtime spec the model reads
- `skills/astrology/references/` — 8 grounded classical rulesets
- `openapi.yaml` — REST schema for ChatGPT, Agentforce, Coze

## Full docs

See `AGENTS.md` for install methods, env vars, and cloud config.
See `README.md` for the project overview.
